title: jaltomata umbellata
intro: Jaltomata umbellata, also known as the 'Frijolito' or 'Clustered Jaltomata', is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jaltomata umbellata include its potential to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in Mexico. Jaltomata umbellata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
